businessBackground: Bloomin' Brands operates a portfolio of casual dining restaurant brands: Outback Steakhouse (flagship), Carrabba's Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill, and Fleming's Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar. The company generates revenue primarily through company-operated restaurants in the US, with a growing international franchise/JV component following the Dec 2024 sale of 67% of its Brazil operations. Revenue model: ~85% company-operated (food/beverage sales), ~15% franchise royalties, fees, and other.

variantViews: The market is pricing BLMN for permanent impairment while ignoring: (1) Outback traffic turned positive in Q4 2025 for the first time since 2021, outperforming industry by 190bps; (2) a credible CEO (Delta COO / Six Flags CEO) backed by Starboard ...
